title: Week 9 Overview
html:
Week 9 Overview

Day 41
1. Use of the verb in ～てform + あげます to describe the act of giving a favour
2. Use of the verb in ～てform + もらいます to describe the act of receiving a favour
3. Grammar focus on the expressions このあいだ and ほかに
4. Three new kanji:  読, 見, 聞

Day 42
1. Use of くれます to describe the act of receiving something from someone
2. Use of the verb in ～てform + くれます to describe receiving a favour
3. Grammar focus on が to make a question about the subject of the sentence
4. Katakana for sports (second part)

Day 43
1. Use of the verb in ～てform + くれませんか to ask for a favour
2. Use of the verb in ～てform + くれて、ありがとう to thank for a favour
3. Use of the verb in  ～てform + いません to express that an action is not complete yet
4. Grammar focus on もう to express that an action is already completed, and まだ to express that an action is not completed yet
5. Three new kanji: 物, 母, 父

Day 44
1. Use of the verb in regular form + ので to express because, since, as an action occurred
2. Use of よね at the end of a sentence to ask for confirmation or agreement
3. Grammar focus on the particles で and ので to express the cause of an action
4. Grammar focus on もうすぐ to express “soon” and 先日 to express “the other day”
5. Katakana for things in the room (second part)

Day 45
1. Use of the verb in present and past form + とき
2. Use the noun+は+といういみです to say “it means…”
3. Use of the verb in plain form + といっていました to report someone's speech
4. Grammar focus on どう to ask for how and どういう to ask for the meaning
5. Grammar focus on たいてい
6. Three new kanji: 兄, 姉, 弟
